data.title: Sunrun prices $431M senior securitization of residential solar systems in latest announcement.
data.description: In San Francisco on July 18, 2025, Sunrun, listed on Nasdaq as RUN, a top provider of clean energy through a subscription service in the country, revealed the pricing of a securitization involving leases and power purchase agreements. This marks Sunrun's fourteenth public securitization since 2015 and its third in 2025.

data.title: Square-parent Block joins S&P 500, stock jumps. Robinhood & AppLovin snubbed. Significant news for investors.
data.description: The parent company of Square, known as Block, is set to become a part of the S&P 500 index prior to the opening of the market on Wednesday. This news caused a significant increase in Block's stock value. Conversely, companies like Robinhood and AppLovin were once again overlooked for inclusion in the index. This development was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Ethereum reaches $3,400 mark in 2025, driven by factors like PoS efficiency and DeFi revival; ALL4 Mining opens crypto access.
data.description: Ethereum (ETH) has surged past $3,400, signaling renewed confidence in the cryptocurrency. The rally is attributed to Ethereum's transition to Proof-of-Stake, the rise of Layer-2 solutions like Arbitrum and zkSync, the revival of DeFi platforms (Aave, Uniswap, Curve), NFT and gaming integration, as well as increased institutional adoption. ALL4 Mining is enabling everyday users to tap into Ethereum's potential without advanced crypto knowledge. It offers a gateway to Ethereum ownership in over 200 countries, converting cloud mining rewards into long-term ETH wealth. This surge is not just about price spikes but also about accessibility and smart investing. Ethereum is regaining its position as a cornerstone of decentralized innovation.

data.title: The Genius Act approved; Mint Miner revolutionizes cloud mining with "National Cloud Mining Plan," providing passive income.
data.description: The world's leading green cloud mining platform, Mint Miner, has launched the "National Cloud Mining Plan" in alignment with the "Genius Act" concept of technological democratization. This plan allows individuals to participate in crypto mining without the need for expensive equipment or technical knowledge. Users can simply register for an account on Mint Miner's platform via mobile or web to access cloud computing power for mining popular cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Litecoin, and DOGE. The platform distributes daily income automatically, aiming to empower ordinary people with technology. Key highlights of Mint Miner's cloud mining service include multi-currency support for Bitcoin, Dogecoin, etc. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Vortex Energy Corp extends marketing program with MCS Market Communication for 45 days from July 21, 2025.
data.description: Vancouver, BC - On July 18, 2025, Vortex Energy Corp. (CSE: VRTX) (OTC: VTECF) (FSE: AA3) disclosed the extension of its agreement with MCS Market Communication Service GmbH. The marketing services contract that began on July 21, 2025, is initially set for 45 days. The potential for extension or reduction of this term is based on management’s assessment of the marketing services’ effectiveness. For inquiries, MCS can be contacted at Rheinpromenade 13, 0789 Monheim am Rhein or via email at info@mcsmarket.de.

data.title: Block, Inc. joins S&P 500 on July 23, 2025, marking a milestone for the business and its various brands. 124characters
data.description: Block, based in Oakland, California, has recently been included in the S&P 500 index starting July 23, 2025. This achievement signifies the robustness of their business model and the dedication of numerous individuals working on developing tools to enhance economic accessibility. Block's portfolio comprises Square, Cash App, Afterpay, TIDAL, Proto, and Bitkey. The company recognizes the support of their customers, employees, and shareholders on this journey and expresses gratitude. Block, Inc. operates under the NYSE ticker symbol "BLOCK."

data.title: FCPT buys 6 Novant Health Urgent Care properties for $12M in South Carolina. Properties are corporate-operated with long-term leases.
data.description: Four Corners Property Trust (NYSE:FCPT), a real estate investment trust focused on owning and acquiring high-quality, net-leased restaurant and retail properties, has recently purchased six Novant Health Urgent Care properties for $12.0 million. These properties, situated in heavily trafficked areas in South Carolina, are operated by the corporation under long-term, triple net leases. The acquisition enhances FCPT's portfolio and strengthens its presence in the region.

data.title: First National Bank Alaska ranked 10th on Top 25 Banks list and 3rd on Top Banks <$5B list by Bank Director.
data.description: In Anchorage, Alaska on July 18, 2025, Bank Director recognized First National (OTCQX:FBAK) as the tenth best bank in the U.S. on its Top 25 Banks list and the third best on its Top Banks with Less than $5 Billion in Total Assets list. This ranking is based on key metrics like return on equity, return on assets, asset quality, and capital adequacy, serving as indicators of the bank's performance and stability in the financial industry.

data.title: Eleven IPs actively exploiting TeleMessage app flaw, while thousands more may be in reconnaissance phase - Report.
data.description: At the latest count on Wednesday, a minimum of eleven IP addresses have been observed actively attempting to exploit the vulnerability. Moreover, there are potentially thousands of other addresses engaging in reconnaissance activities related to the issue.

data.title: Dow Futures rise as market surges with Nvidia and AMD doing well. Tesla and Google set for earnings. AI stock breaks out.
data.description: The stock market has recently hit new highs fueled by the performances of tech giants Nvidia and AMD. However, there are concerns about the market being overextended. Investors are now eagerly anticipating the earnings reports of Tesla and Google. Notably, an AI company's stock has surged as Nvidia and AMD continue to perform well. This information was not directly sourced from Investor's Business Daily.
